findings.message: Summary still frames input as 'YAML frontmatter entries' only, despite TASK-01 accepting dual-format (YAML frontmatter + body-format). Should mention dual-format to avoid implementation mismatch.

TC-04 tests 'malformed YAML frontmatter' but body-format files have no YAML frontmatter at all — this is the normal fallback path (TC-07a), not an error. TC-04 should test genuinely malformed YAML (broken syntax within frontmatter), not the absence of frontmatter.

Planning validation only cites YAML-format archive example (brik-sticky-book-now-room-context). Should also cite body-format examples (lp-do-ideas-execution-guarantee, bos-loop-assessment-registry) since the dual-format parser must handle both.
Test describe block naming 'parsePatternReflectionFrontmatter' drifts from the actual export name 'parsePatternReflectionEntries' defined in TASK-01 execution plan.
